reference: Hello. A kick by a three-year-old during the recovery phase of a laparoscopic-assisted vaginal hysterectomy needs medical attention immediately. Stop oral intake. I would advise you to be seen by a doctor on an urgent basis, who, upon general and local abdominal examination, would advise you to undergo an ultrasonography examination.
text: Hello. A 6x3-year-old during the recovery phase of a laparoscopic-assisted vaginal hysterectomy needs medical attention immediately. Stop oral intake. I would advise you to be seen by a doctor on an urgent basis. Who, upon general and local abdominal examination, would advise you to undergo an ultrasonography examination?
